name: Ningxia Orient Tantalum Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningxia Orient Tantalum Industry Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and produces rare metals in China. It offers antimony, titanium, and related alloys; titanium products, such as Titanium and titanium alloy wires, pipes, bars, ingots, rings and forgings, and slabs, as well as other compounds, including titanium tetrachloride and titanium trichloride; beryllium bronze alloys; photovoltaic materials comprising silicon carbide powders and cutting steel wires. The company also provides energy materials; superconducting series; and other products, such as molybdenum strips, potassium chloride, sodium chloride, potassium fluoride, molybdenum foils and strips, and high temperature infrared radiation coatings. Its products are primarily used in electronics, communication, aviation, aerospace, metallurgy, petroleum, chemical, sports, medicals, atomic energy, solar energy, and other fields. Ningxia Orient Tantalum Industry Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Shizuishan, China.
